## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Rosella Maldera for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rosella has diverse experience in content creation, editorial management, and client-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Strong background in adapting to new industries/technologies and managing complex workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Some experience with AI/LLM training, but limited experience integrating AI into content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks candidates who will heavily leverage AI tools and help improve internal product/workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Managing editor position combines content refinement/editing and AI workflow management](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Requires strong editorial skills, AI understanding, and client-facing abilities](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Part of customer operations team, working in 2-3 person pods serving clients](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Involves coordinating with different teams and managing project workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [Extensive agency/startup experience in marketing and content roles](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Progressed from copywriter to editorial production manager at Draft.Def (technical B2B content)](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Current role as account manager for affiliate marketing programs](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Side project training LLM models, but limited experience integrating AI into content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1055.0)

### Client Management Philosophy

  - [Emphasizes building trust through showcasing value and work ethic](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Focuses on empathy and education when managing client expectations](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Prioritizes meeting all deadlines, struggles to deprioritize clients](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [When pressed, acknowledges prioritizing based on urgency/importance](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### AI Experience and Test Project Approach

  - [Some experience rating/reviewing LLM outputs, but limited workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [For test project, used ChatGPT and Claude to rewrite article](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Provided extensive context to AI tools, then heavily edited output](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
  - [Created content brief partially manually, supplemented with AI assistance](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)

### GrowthX Challenges and Expectations

  - [Main challenge is getting team members to fully leverage AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1632.0)
  - [Seeking candidates who will dive deep into technical side and help improve internal product](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Expectation to use AI extensively in content creation process, not just for minor assistance](https://fathom.video/share/avRTT8c6uZma4iztYcg-1tAKyzpVQPgZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

## Next Steps

  - Consider Rosella's fit given limited AI workflow experience vs. strong editorial background
  - Evaluate ability/willingness to heavily leverage AI tools as required for the role
  - Determine if additional discussions needed regarding AI integration approach
